package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_imports_http_status_or_abort_semantics: Services that depend on transport-specific status constants, abort helpers, or Gin response behavior.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule173NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule173NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule173NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario173Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule173NegativeService, input Rule173NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
